nasb.text: Until this same day, until you have brought in the offering of your God, you shall eat neither bread nor roasted grain nor new growth. It is to be a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your dwelling places.

esv.text: And you shall eat neither bread nor grain parched or fresh until this same day, until you have brought the offering of your God: it is a statute forever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

cnv.text: 無論是餅，是烘過的穀粒，或是新穗子，你們都不可吃，直等到你們把　神的供物帶來的那天，才可以吃；這要在你們的一切住處，作世世代代永遠的律例。

ccb.text: 你们必须先将这些祭物献给你们的上帝后，才可以吃饼、烘烤的谷物和新鲜穗子。不论住在哪里，你们都要世代遵守这永远不变的律例。
